title: Database Design — ERD + Normalization
description: Design an ER diagram for a business scenario, normalize to 3NF, and convert to a relational schema with proper keys and constraints.

title: SQL KPI Queries
description: Write SQL queries using JOINs, GROUP BY, and aggregate functions to compute business KPIs from a provided database.

title: Cruise Line Database Project
description: Full database project supervised by Hai Wang. Design a cruise line database, implement it, and extract business insights via SQL queries.

title: Assignment 1 — Classification Fundamentals
description: Implement logistic regression, analyze bias-variance tradeoff, and evaluate overfitting on a classification dataset.

title: Assignment 2 — Model Validation & Instance-Based
description: Apply k-fold CV and bootstrap for model evaluation; implement kNN and clustering algorithms.

title: Assignment 3 — Ensemble Methods
description: Compare Random Forest and boosting methods (GBM, XGBoost, AdaBoost) on a prediction task.

title: Assignment 4 — SVMs and Neural Networks
description: Implement SVMs with kernel selection and train neural networks for classification tasks.

title: Assignment 5 — NLP and Transformers
description: Apply NLP techniques: Word2Vec embeddings, transformer fine-tuning with Hugging Face.

title: Assignment 2 — LP Formulation and Duality
description: Formulate and solve linear programs; interpret dual solutions and shadow prices for business decisions.

title: Assignment 3 — Integer Programming
description: Model discrete decision problems using binary and integer variables; solve facility location and project selection problems.

title: Assignment 5 — Decision Analysis
description: Build decision trees with EMV calculations, compute EVPI, and apply Bayesian updating for multi-stage decisions.

title: EA1 — Monte Carlo Simulation
description: Use @RISK to model uncertainty in a financial investment decision with Monte Carlo simulation.

title: EA2 — Financial Statement Analytics
description: Build a 3-statement financial model and perform DCF valuation with scenario analysis.

title: EA4 — NLP in Finance
description: Apply NLP to analyze financial text — earnings calls, news sentiment, and event-driven signals.

title: AI-Assisted Equity Research Whitepaper
description: Full equity research report combining traditional fundamental analysis with AI-assisted tools; critically evaluate AI output quality.

title: Agentic AI System Project
description: Build a full agentic AI pipeline using LangChain/LangGraph with HITL controls and LangSmith monitoring.

title: Regression Analysis Project
description: Fit multiple regression models, interpret coefficients, compute prediction intervals, and assess model quality.

title: AI Bias Identification Assignment
description: Identify and analyze AI bias across 6 real-world scenarios using ethics frameworks and the defend-then-critique methodology.

title: Python Programming Labs
description: Series of labs covering Python fundamentals, pandas, OOP, and Jupyter notebooks.

title: Forecasting Web App
description: Build a Flask-based forecasting web application that replicates an experimental research design.
